body.title: D254: Human turns skip Ollama, route direct to cloud
body.result: D254 implemented: is_user_turn gates Ollama skip in inference_gateway.py interactive section; last-resort retry allows human turns on budget exhaustion. Igor needs restart to pick up.
body.description: D254. When a turn originates from a human (channel=web or repl, author is not a background job/cron), skip tier.2 Ollama entirely and route directly to tier.3+. Ollama stays for background tasks only. Cloud budget exhaustion is the only condition under which human turns fall back to Ollama. Root cause: Ollama busy with reading jobs causes 90s+ interactive latency and double cloud calls. Find the tier selection / prefrontal routing logic in cognition/ and add channel/author check before Ollama attempt.
